changes: HP has been increased from 14,500 to 15,000.
HP has been reduced from 15,500 to 15,000.
Riddle of Fire: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Riddle of Earth: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Eye for an Eye: Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Lightspeed: Recast time has been reduced from 90 to 60 seconds.

new_content.name: And We Shall Call It Hydatos
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock the Hydatos region.

new_content.name: The Forbidden Land, Eureka Hydatos
new_content.description: An exploration zone that serves as the conclusion to the Eureka expedition.

new_content.name: The Baldesion Arsenal
new_content.description: A brutally difficult open dungeon that can be challenged by up to 56 players at once.

new_content.name: Hidden Gorge
new_content.description: A new Rival Wings campaign map for large-scale PvP combat.

housing.description: No girls allowed. And while we're at it─no boys, either.

housing.name: Paissa Chronometer
housing.description: As if the beastkin's physique simply does not beg to be reimagined as a convenient timepiece.
